## 1. Description
Provide a summary of the changes and the problem solved. Link to the target issue (e.g., `Closes #102`).

## 2. Type of Change
Please delete options that are not relevant:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactor (non-breaking code restructuring)
- [ ] Documentation update

## 3. How Has This Been Tested?
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes:
*   **Automated Tests**: (e.g., `python manage.py test apps.authentication`)
*   **Manual Verification Steps**:
    1. Go to '...'
    2. Input '...'
    3. Verify output matches '...'

## 4. Developer Verification Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style and conventions of this project (Engineering Handbook).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or console errors.
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes.
- [ ] I have verified that no cross-tenant data leakage occurs.
- [ ] My implementation meets the Definition of Done (DoD).
